name: PlacingQuarterAttributes
summary: The PlacingQuarterAttributes class contains the basic attributes for placing quarters.

constructors.name: PlacingQuarterAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new placing quarter attributes instance. The default parameters are: TopLeft = true, TopRight = true, BottomLeft = true, BottomRight = true.

constructors.name: PlacingQuarterAttributes(Boolean, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
constructors.signature: public PlacingQuarterAttributes(bool TopLeft, bool TopRight, bool BottomLeft, bool BottomRight)
constructors.summary: Creates a new placing quarter attributes instance with the given parameters.

params.name: TopLeft
params.doc: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the top left direction.

params.name: TopRight
params.doc: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the top right direction.

params.name: BottomLeft
params.doc: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the bottom left direction.

params.name: BottomRight
params.doc: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the bottom right direction.

methods.name: Clone
methods.summary: Creates a new object that is a copy of the current instance.

returns.doc: A new object that is a copy of the current instance.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: BottomLeft
properties.summary: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the bottom left direction.

properties.name: BottomRight
properties.summary: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the bottom right direction.

properties.name: TopLeft
properties.summary: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the top left direction.

properties.name: TopRight
properties.summary: Defines whether the object can search for a suitable location in the top right direction.
